system.description:
Discipline: Waijia, Qinggong
Skill: Athletics
Type: Normal/Special
Qi: 3

You appear in a flash above your opponent and fall like an iron spear upon him. Make an Athletics roll TN 6. On a Success you appear above the target by as much as 60 feet. You then fall upon the target making the relevant Melee roll against their Evade. For every 20 feet you descend take -1d10 to your Attack roll but +1d10 to your Damage roll (Closed Damage). On a Failure you take falling Damage. Because this is a combination of Spear of the Infinite Emperor and Great Stride you must have both these Techniques to learn or use I am the Arrow. You must be able to see the target before using this Technique. This requires at least 20 feet of space above the target and cannot be performed if there are things obstructing a clear path for the descent. To counter this Attack characters must make first make a Detect roll against the user’s Stealth Rating. Cathartic: On a Cathartic use you take no penalty for the length of the descent and you do 2 Extra Wounds.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.prerequisiteTechniques: Spear of the Infinite Emperor; Great Stride
system.requirementNotes: Must be able to see the target, have at least 20 feet of space above the target, and have a clear descent path.
system.catharticEffect: On a Cathartic use you take no penalty for the length of the descent and you do 2 Extra Wounds.
